name: MedTerms MCP
description: Medical terminology intelligence for AI agents — ICD-10-CM lookup, MedDRA hierarchy and SOC mapping, RxNorm drug concepts, CTCAE v5.0 grading, and cross-terminology mapping. Built by a CMPP-certified PhD in Neuroscience with 10+ years in pharma medical communications. No API key required — uses free NIH public APIs.

tools.name: lookup_icd10
tools.description: Search ICD-10-CM codes by diagnosis name or look up a specific code. Returns code, full description, and category.

tools.name: lookup_meddra
tools.description: Look up a MedDRA Preferred Term (PT), identify its System Organ Class (SOC), hierarchy level, and related LLT synonyms. Critical for adverse event coding and pharmacovigilance.

tools.name: lookup_rxnorm
tools.description: Look up a drug's RxNorm concept, RxCUI identifier, ingredient relationships, ATC drug class, and brand/generic mapping.

tools.name: crossmap_icd_meddra
tools.description: Cross-map between ICD-10 and MedDRA terminology with regulatory context. Critical for regulatory submissions, REMS, and pharmacovigilance.

tools.name: search_medical_concept
tools.description: Search for a medical concept across terminology systems including ICD-10-CM, MedDRA, and RxNorm.
